name: Raspberry Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Cream butter with 3/4 cup sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg yolks.
4. Stir in flour until blended. Spread evenly in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
5. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
6. While the layer is baking, beat egg whites until foamy. Double the volume of the egg whites.
7. Beat in remaining 3/4 cup sugar until meringue forms firm peaks.
8. Fold in almonds.
9. Spread raspberry preserves over baked layer and sprinkle with coconut.
10. Top with meringue.
11. Bake for an additional 25 minutes or until lightly golden.
12. Cool completely on a wire rack.
13. Cut into 1-inch squares. May be frozen by wrapping securely in plastic wrap and then placing in a Tupperware container.
